# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create an Istio RequestAuthentication policy for JWT validation. Configure jwks and issuer settings to validate incoming tokens. Set up rules to extract JWT claims from Authorization headers. This is for our API authentication layer.
# Category: istio_jwt_validation_weak

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: jwt-auth
  namespace: your-namespace
spec:
  jwks:
    - keySet: |
        {
          "alg": "RS256",
          "nbf": 1577836800,
          "kid": "my-key",
          "keys": [
            {
              "alg": "RS256",
              "e": AQAB,
              "kid": "my-key",
              "n": "Your-RSA-Public-Key",
              "p": "Your-RSA-Public-Key-Parameters",
              "q": "Your-RSA-Public-Key-Primes",
              "d": "Your-RSA-Private-Key-Exponent"
            }
          ]
        }
  issuer: https://your-auth-server.com
  requestHeaders:
    - action: IGNORE_UNKNOWN
      name: Authorization
      names: ["authorization"]
  subjectClaim: sub
  tokenReview:
    audienceCheck: EXCLUDE_SELF
